nodes.name: .mcp.json
nodes.summary: MCP servers configures codegraph (stdio)、sketch (http) and playwright (npx) three MCP servers, providing code indexing, sketch and browser automation capabilities to Claude Code.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: AI assistant project manual: contains Trellis instructions, context7 (ctx7) document retrieval guide, Vite+ toolchain usage and CodeGraph code retrieval rules.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains multiple marker blocks (TRELLIS / context7 / VITE PLUS / CODEGRAPH) preserved as inserts in agent context.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Single-line prompt file reminding Claude Code to first read AGENTS.md before performing any task.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Toolchain bootstrap script: installs vp (Vite+), ctx7 (context7), codegraph, and initializes the codegraph index.
nodes.languageNotes: Detects OS (Darwin/Linux/Windows) and selects the appropriate installer pipeline.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README: briefly introduces the Vite+ monorepo starter and lists common `vp run` commands (ready/test/build/dev).

nodes.name: lefthook.yml
nodes.summary: Git hooks config: pre-commit runs vp staged + Spotless Java formatting + codegraph sync; pre-push runs full check + Java checkstyle + Error Prone; commit-msg enforces conventional commits.

nodes.name: opencode.jsonc
nodes.summary: OpenCode client MCP config: enables the same codegraph / sketch / playwright servers as .mcp.json for OpenCode.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Monorepo root manifest: ESM project, Node >=22.12, pnpm 11.6; declares ready/dev/dev:vben scripts and top-level devDependencies (commitlint, lefthook, vite-plus) bound to the pnpm catalog.

nodes.name: pnpm-workspace.yaml
nodes.summary: pnpm workspace definition: globs apps/*, packages/*, tools/* and excludes the self-contained vue-vben-admin and react-admin subtrees; defines shared version catalog, overrides, peerDependencyRules and allowBuilds.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses catalogMode=prefer so member packages can reference versions via `catalog:`.

nodes.name: skills-lock.json
nodes.summary: Skills lockfile: pins source path and SHA256 hash for each skill (caveman, diagnose, grill-me, handoff, tdd, to-issues, to-prd) sourced from vinvcn/mattpocock-skills-zh-CN.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Minimal root tsconfig: nodenext module/resolution, noEmit, allowImportingTsExtensions and esModuleInterop — a base config extended by member packages.
